Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Ang encounter ni Carmina Villarroel sa walang-respetong aktres at kay Julia Montes
snippet.description:
Bago matapos ang kanyang PEP Live interview, sumabak sa bagong "PEP Challenge" na "Spill The 'T'" si Carmina Villarroel.

Binigyan ng mga tanong si Carmina na kailangan niyang sabihin ang totoo.

Isa sa mga tanong ay kung nagkaroon na ba ng pagkakataon na may kinumpronta siyang young actor o actress dahil sa pag-a-attitude.

Binalikan ng 45-year-old Kapuso actress ang encounter niya sa isang young actress na pinagsabihan niya dahil sa hindi magandang trato nito sa sariling ina nito.

Pagkatapos ay nagkuwento pa si Carmina ng kanyang encounter sa isa namang disrespectful young actress.

Hindi niya tuloy mapigilan na ikumpara ang batang aktres na ito sa isa pang young actress noon na hindi pa niya nakikilala pero nilapitan siya't bumati sa kanya, si Julia Montes.

Panoorin ang video para sa detalye ng kuwentong ito ni Carmina.

Para sa related article, i-click ang link na ito: http://bit.ly/CarminaJuliaMontes

Para naman sa full PEP Live interview ni Carmina, i-click ito: http://bit.ly/CarminaPEPLive

#CarminaVillarroel? #BabawiinKoAngLahat? #PEPlive?

Host: Jimpy Anarcon
Livestream Producer: Rommel R. Llanes

snippet.title: Parokya ni Edgar performs "Para Sa'yo" LIVE on Wish 107.5 Bus
snippet.description:
Parokya ni Edgar performs "Para Sa'yo" live on the Wish 107.5 Bus! Lifted off their 2005 album "Halina sa Parokya," this classic hit is a straightforwardly written song about changing вҖ” for the better вҖ” because of love. 

Follow Wish 107.5's social media accounts!

Facebook: https://facebook.com/WishFM1075/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Wish1075
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/wish1075/

Visit Wish 107.5's awesome official website: www.wish1075.com 

Stream this song on Spotify:
https://open.spotify.com/album/1WwRGp57o6VFDZa2B5jfez?highlight=spotify:track:7JJ1NHjQ6ObYWLk1OnFyde

Follow Parokya ni Edgar on social media:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ParokyaNiEdgarPH/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/parokyaniedgar 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/parokyaniedgar/

Check out Universal Records' YouTube and social media accounts:
YouTube: http://bit.ly/UniversalRecPH
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/universalrecordsph
Twitter: https://twitter.com/universalrecph
Instagram: https://instagram/com/universalrecordsph

#WISHclusive

***
Wish 107.5 is an all-hits FM radio station based in Quezon City, Philippines. It has truly gone out, beyond the conventional, to provide multiple platforms where great Filipino talents can perform and showcase their music. With the Wish 107.5 Bus, people now don't need to buy concert tickets just to see their favorite artists perform on stage.  

However, innovation doesnвҖҷt stop in just delivering the coolest musical experience вҖ” Wish 107.5 has set the bar higher as it tapped the power of technology to let the Filipino artistry shine in the global stage. With its intensified investment in its digital platforms, it has transformed itself from being a local FM station to becoming a sought-after WISHclusive gateway to the world.

For more information, visit www.wish1075.com. For all-day and all-night wishful music, tune in via your radio or download the Wish 107.5 app (available for both iOS and Android users).

Feel free to SHARE this video but DO NOT REUPLOAD. Thank you!

snippet.title: What Is BLACKPINK's Routine Before Taking the Stage?
snippet.description:
James Corden welcomes his friends from BLACKPINK to The Late Late Show and Lisa tells James about the band's pre-show ritual of the low-five and the group talks about getting ready for "The Show" - their live virtual concert on their YouTube channel this weekend, featuring some of RosГ©'s new music.

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

[Intro]

But you can't take theвҖ…hoodвҖ…out the man

Isasapuso

Yeah

I stay on my business while watchin you dyin'

1st true Filipino rapper on the news
Sit, enjoy it if ya cool
Haters can snooze
While I put my city on the map
22-double the O-longapo City no cap
Never forgettinвҖҷ the street where my
Cousin would sit when we always just listen to rap
Kendrick, Em, & A$AP with some metal
And man we would turn up with that
Been mundane till the sun came
Now I want fame like a kid in the trap uh
Aye
I been in Spain (Spain)
But the letter вҖҷS' is silent (pain)
IвҖҷm claimin' my reign like a king
So I can water crops for survivin' (rain rain)
Go away if you trippin' (yuh)

Ain't got no love for the people
Who talk over songs when they

3 stars and a sun, aye
Blue, red draped down on a flag
No we never fear none
Most of us didn't grow up with a trust fund
Know that I'm willin' to kill for a loved one
I'm on the move from a nothin' to someone
Reminding my people to shout:

Tayo ay Pilipino
Kahit anong kulay ng balat
Isasapuso

Walang tatalo sa bagsik

Isigaw ng malakas ang

Aye
Huh, aye
Kung inakala mong isang lenggwahe
Lang kayang gamitin ni Ez Mil
La kang mapapala kung ganyan ka
Magisip kay Bathala ka sisingil;
Utang na galing sa loob na
Lumutang, hinain sa turon na may
Pusang sinaing sa-
(Mag ilokano ka tol!)
Ano?

Okay!

UrAY NO NGA IMBAGAK KINYAYO

NGATA KAY-KAYATEM NGA PATAYENG KA

Sikayo nga am-amin
Lahat kayo
All of you
Ever since bata ako I've been kinda

Sure, some would be like:

I'M PINOY

NOBODY WILL EVER LOOK AT ME THE

Ng Pilipino

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвҖҷt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвҖҷs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вҖ” and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвҖҷs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвҖҷt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вҖ” The pacifier hack 

2:42 вҖ” A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вҖ” The getting along/best friendsвҖҷ shirt 

7:20 вҖ” Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вҖ” Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вҖ“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
В 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: KIKILABUTAN KAYO SA SINAPIT NIYA!
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

Catch the latest episodes of 'Wowowin' weekdays at 5 PM on GMA Network, hosted by Willie Revillame.#Wowowin #TutokToWinsaWowowin

snippet.title: Military takes power in Myanmar, Aung San Suu Kyi detained
snippet.description:
Myanmar leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior figures from the ruling party have been detained in an early morning raid. 
The military declares a state of emergency following days of escalating tension between the civilian government and the powerful military, which claims the November election was tainted by fraud. 
 
Al JazeeraвҖҷs Victoria Gatenby reports.

- Subscribe to our channel: http://aje.io/AJSubscribe 
- Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/AJEnglish 
- Find us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/aljazeera

snippet.title: Tutok to Win sa Wowowin: February 2, 2021
snippet.description:
Damang-dama na natin ang pagmamahal ni Kuya Wil dahil simula na ng pamimigay ng malalaking papremyo! Nakatutok na ba kayo sa #TutoktoWinsaWowowin?

Tuloy tuloy ang pamimigay ng papremyo ng Shopee hanggang sa 2.2 TV Special! 'Wag kalimutan mag-claim ng raffle code araw-araw dahil baka ikaw na ang susunod ng manalo sa Shopee Spin-a-Wil! Buksan lamang ang app at hanapin ang Spin-a-Wil!

Siguraduhing na-download niyo na ang app!
Kung hindi pa, ito ang link to download Shopee now! Just click https://shopee.ph/ShopeeWowowin

3:12 - WHOSE LINE UP IS IT ANYWAY
Pencilmate's on the case! Can he find the culprit who took Granny's glasses?!

6:30 - FREE FOR LAUNCH TUESDAY?
Pencilmate's LAUNCHING into space to save the planet Earth! 

9:43 - GOOD GOLDFISH
Can Pencilmate's GENIUS goldfish help Pencilmate become SUPER COOL?!

13:10 - BUST A MOVIE 
Pencilmate can't seem to watch the movie in peace! Will the theater calm down?!

14:41 -  CITIZEN TRAIN
Pencilmate barely makes the train!! But that's the only thing he's got going for him because... OUCH WHAT'S HITTING HIS BUTT?!

17:08 - WHAT'S ALL THE HOOPLA?
Pencilmate gets kissed... BY THE WRONG PERSON!! 

19:18 - NEITHER HAIR NOR THERE
Does Princess Pencilmiss even need Prince Pencilmate to save her?! It's 2019!! She's a strong, independent woman!!

21:37 - WISHFUL THINKING
Pencilmate finds a magical lamp and gets to make ONE wish... will it really come true??

24:17 - THINGS THAT GO BUMP IN THE NIGHT
Pencilmate tries his best to fall asleep but can't!! What's keeping him awake?!

26:37 - NO BUS NO FUSS
Can Pencilmate catch Pencilmiss before she catches the bus?

28:50 - DARK SIDE OF THE BALLOON
Pencilmate discovers the joy (and the headache) of helium.

ABOUT PENCILMATION :
Pencilmation is a cartoon channel for everyone, especially not-too-serious grown-ups. It is made with love and a lot of fun by an international team helmed by Ross Bollinger who started the channel alone in his room a long time ago. Follow the new, wacky, and often times quite silly adventures of Pencilmate, Little Blue Man, Pencilmiss and other toons every Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday and Sunday.

Pencilmation is a cartoon channel for everyone, especially not-too-serious grown-ups. It is made with love and a lot of fun by an international team helmed by Ross Bollinger who started the channel alone in his room a long time ago. Follow the new, wacky, and often times quite silly adventures of Pencilmate, Little Blue Man, Pencilmiss and other toons every Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday and Sunday.

snippet.title: LAKERS at HAWKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 1, 2021
snippet.description:
LAKERS at HAWKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | February 1, 2021

Davis, Lakers Handle Hawks!

The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Atlanta Hawks, 107-99, behind Anthony DavisвҖҷ team-high 25 PTS. LeBron James finished with 21 PTS, 7 REB and 9 AST, Montrezl Harrell added 19 PTS off the Los Angeles bench, and Dennis Schroder scored 16 PTS. Trae Young led the way for the Hawks with 25 PTS and a season-high 16 AST, while John Collins finished with 22 PTS and 7 REB, and Clint Capela recorded a double-double with 16 PTS and 13 REB.

Next Games:
Denver Nuggets at Los Angeles Lakers вҖ“ Feb. 4 at 10pm/et on TNT
Dallas Mavericks at Atlanta Hawks вҖ“ Feb. 3 at 7:30pm/et on NBA League Pass

snippet.title: 'Worst nightmare': violence feared after Myanmar military coup
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our YouTube channel for free here: 
https://sc.mp/subscribe-youtube

MyanmarвҖҷs military took power from an elected government after detaining civilian leader Aung San Suu Kyi and several other politicians on February 1, 2021. The coup came after Suu KyiвҖҷs party won landslide victory in a November 8 election, which the military claimed to be fraudulent.

snippet.description:
Part 1 link: https://youtu.be/ZiSuBZXdKm8

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

snippet.title: LAKERS at CELTICS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | January 30, 2021
snippet.description:
LAKERS at CELTICS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | January 30, 2021

The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Boston Celtics, 96-95, in Boston. Anthony Davis recorded 27 PTS and 14 REB for the Lakers, while LeBron James added 21 PTS, 7 REB and 7 AST in the victory. Jayson Tatum (30 PTS, 9 REB) and Jaylen Brown (28 PTS, 3 AST) combined for 58 PTS for the Celtics.

snippet.title: NETS at WIZARDS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | January 31, 2021
snippet.description:
NETS at WIZARDS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | January 31, 2021

Russell Westbrook (41 PTS, 10 REB, 8 AST) and Bradley Beal (37 PTS, 22 in the 4th quarter) combined for 78 PTS for the Washington Wizards as they defeated the Brooklyn Nets, 149-146. Kevin Durant led the Nets with 37 PTS, along with 7 REB and 6 AST.

snippet.title: PRICELESS MOMENT NI IDOL RAFFY & FAMILY WITH MOMMY CARING.
snippet.description:
MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 13M followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

м§Җкө¬м—җ нҲӯ л–Ём–ҙм§„ IвҖҷm an alien on this earth
лӮҳ нҷҖлЎң м–ҙл””м—җлҸ„ мҶҚн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•„ ліҙмқҙкі 
м•„л¬ҙлҰ¬ мӣғм–ҙлҙҗлҸ„ I feel so lonely
м§Җкө¬мқёкіј м„һмқҙл Өкі  л“ңлҠ” мҷёкі„мқё 
мҶҢлҰ¬ лӮҙ л§җмқ„ н•ҙлҙҗлҸ„ лҲ„кө¬лҸ„ л“Јм§Ҳ м•Ҡм•„

лӮҜм„  кіім—җ л¶ҲмӢңм°©н•ҙ мІҳмқҢм—җлҠ” кё°лҢҖл§Ң к°Җл“қ м°јлҚҳ лӮҳмқҳ
лҲҲл§қмҡём—” к№Ңл§Ң л°Өмқҙ лҗҳл©ҙ мһҗкҫё лҲҲл¬јмқҙ кі м—¬
лӮҳмқҳ лӢ№лӢ№н•Ё лҳҗн•ң лҲ„кө°к°Җм—җкІҢ л°үліҙмқј мҲҳ мһҲкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ
мЈҪмқҖ л“Ҝ мӮҙм•„мҷ”лҚ”лӢҲ м–ҙлҠҗмғҲ лӮң нҷҖлЎңм„ң м Җкё° лҸҷл–Ём–ҙм ё мһҲм§Җ
к·ёл“Өкіј лӮҳлҠ” мҷ м§Җ к°ҷмқҖ кіім—җ мһҲм–ҙлҸ„ I was an alien yeah
мҡ°мЈјм—җм„ң лӮ м•„мҷҖ л¶ҲмӢңм°©н•ҙ мғҒмІҳл§Ң к°Җл“қн•ҙм§„ лӮҳлҠ” мҷёнҶЁмқҙ

ItвҖҷs a lonely night мЎ°мҡ©н•ң л°Өмқҙм•ј
л„Ҳл¬ҙ м–ҙл‘ЎлӢӨ лӮҳмқҳ лӮҳм§Җл§үн•ң лӮҙ лӘ©мҶҢлҰ¬лЎң 
мқҙлӨ„лӮј кұ°м•ј м Җкё° лі„л“Ө мӮ¬мқҙм—җм„ң
IвҖҷm just lonely лҲ„к°Җ лӮ  мң„н•ҙ мҶҗмқ„ л»—м–ҙ лӮ  мһЎм•„мӨҳ

м§Җкө¬м—җ нҲӯ л–Ём–ҙм§„ IвҖҷm an alien on this earth
лӮҳ нҷҖлЎң м–ҙл””м—җлҸ„ мҶҚн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•„ ліҙмқҙкі 
м•„л¬ҙлҰ¬ мӣғм–ҙлҙҗлҸ„ I feel so lonely
м§Җкө¬мқёкіј м„һмқҙл Өкі  л“ңлҠ” мҷёкі„мқё 
мҶҢлҰ¬ лӮҙ л§җмқ„ н•ҙлҙҗлҸ„ лҲ„кө¬лҸ„ л“Јм§Ҳ м•Ҡм•„

к·ёлһҳ лӮҳлҠ” м—Ҷм–ҙ л§Өмқј к°Җл“қ л„ҳміҗ
лӮҳлҠ” лӮҳмқҳ кұұм •мқ„ м§Ҡм–ҙм§„ мұ„лЎң
к·ё лҲ„кө¬лҸ„ мӢ кІҪ м•Ҳ мҚЁлҸ„ лӮң м§Җміҗ

н•ҳлҠҳ лҶ’мқҙ л°”лқјліҙлҠ” кіім—җ л¬ҙмҲҳнһҲлҸ„ л§ҺмқҖ кҝҲмқҙ 
лӮҳлҘј л°ҳкё°лӢҲк№Ң DonвҖҷt care about depressionлҸ„
к·ёлһҳ лӮҙк°Җ мӮҙм•„к°Җм•ј н•ҳм§Җ 
л¬ҙл„Ҳм§Җл©ҙ лӘЁл“  кІҢ мҲҳнҸ¬к°Җ лҗ  кұ°м•ј кҝҲл§Ҳм ҖлҸ„

мҲҳнҸ¬к°Җ лҗ  кұ°м•ј кҝҲл§Ҳм ҖлҸ„
лӮҙк°Җ мқҙкіім—җм„ң л§Ҳм…ЁлҚҳ мҲЁл§Ҳм ҖлҸ„

кҝҲмқ„ мң„н•ҙм„ң нғҗнғҒм§Җ м•Ҡм•„?

к·ёлһҳ лҲ„кө°к°ҖлҠ” лӮҳлҘј мӣҗм№ҳ м•Ҡм•ҳкі  
лӘЁл‘җмқҳ нҳёк°җмқ„ мӮ¬кё°м—” лӮҳлҠ” л„Ҳл¬ҙ м–ҙл ём–ҙ
мӢңк°„мқҙ м§ҖлӮ мҲҳлЎқ лӮҳлҠ” м–ҙлҘёмқҙ лҸј к°”кі 
мҷ„лІҪн•ҳм§„ м•Ҡм•„лҸ„ мһҗлһ‘мҠӨлҹҪкІҢ лӮ  лӢӨлҸ…м—¬

ItвҖҷs a lonely night мЎ°мҡ©н•ң л°Өмқҙм•ј

мқҙлӨ„лӮј кұ°м•ј м Җкё° лі„л“Ө мӮ¬мқҙм—җм„ң
IвҖҷm just lonely лҲ„к°Җ лӮ  мң„н•ҙ мҶҗмқ„ л»—м–ҙ лӮ  мһЎм•„мӨҳ

snippet.title: GODZILLA VS KONG TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Detail You Missed!
snippet.description:
Godzilla vs Kong Trailer Reaction & Breakdown! What is Kong's axe made out of, and is the true enemy monster... MECHA-GODZILLA? Make sure to enter to win a brand new PlayStation 5 by visiting http://epicheroshop.com/giveaway

Check out our sweet, sweet merch! http://www.newrockstarsmerch.com
Subscribe:вҖӢ вҖӢhttp://bit.ly/SubNewRockstarsвҖӢ | Enable ALL push notifications вҖӢ рҹ””

Godzilla vs Kong, coming to HBO Max on March 31, is the followup to Godzilla King of the Monsters (2019), Kong Skull Island (2017), and Godzilla (2014). Why is King Kong fighting Godzilla now, and what is the deeper threat that they might join forces to fight? Is MECHA-GODZILLA hiding in plain sight in this trailer? Erik Voss breaks down everything you need to know about this Godzilla Kong movie, and every detail that you might have overlooked in this trailer. What is the secret connection between Kong and the girl, Jia? What conspiracy are the organizations Apex and Monarch hiding after the events of Godzilla King of the Monsters? What VFX details make the Godzilla vs Kong fight scenes so much fun to watch?

snippet.description:
PAJAMA PARTY - 1096 Gang (Lyrics) | pam param pam pam
Lyrics video for "PAJAMA PARTY" by 1096 Gang.

"1096 alam mo na kapag naririnig mo 'to, 
Nasa kabilang banda kami ng hinahanap mo
Pamparam pam pam pamparaparam pam, 
Sumabay lang sa bayo sarap sa pakiramdaman
Pamparam pam pam pamparaparam pam"

PAJAMA PARTY - 1096 Gang // tiktok song

Official Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l7uB0DG2jMA
Subscribe to 1096 Gang: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCadSpxMdMlAZPeLxqiGPJZg

рҹҺӨ Lyrics: PAJAMA PARTY - 1096 Gang

[Verse 1: Guddhist]
Pagpasok ng tunog tenga ko nilabasan
Goodshit si Gecko halatang nasarapan
Tapos tignan mo si Dan fasting parang Ramadan
Damo 'yan pare 'di na 'ko n'yan tinatalaban
Ginagawa ko lang yung mga gusto nila na gawin
'Di ako pasaway kaya 'wag n'yo 'ko sawayin
Subukan mong tanungin yung mga nasa likod
Kung pamilyar ba sila sa pangalang kuya Gudd
Kuya Gudd, pwede ba ako sa 'yo rumekta?
Sabi nung kaibigan ng kaibigan ko na hustla
Hindi 'to basta-basta mahirap maabot
Mahirap makakolabo sa pera si kuya Gudd
Ayokong sapilitan gusto ko yung natural
'Pag ako nakulitan gusto ko nang manakal
Biro lang pero walang sini-sino aming gang
1096 Mandaluyong bayan ng mga buang
Polo Pi pakisabihan nga si tropang Luci
J i-roll mo na 'yan na agayat na broccoli
Basic parang ollie iprito mo na 'yan
Paborito na chubibo sa hapag ng kainan lumpia

[Verse 2: Youngwise]
Dami na ngang umaangal sobrang ingay na daw natin
Yung kalabog ng tugtug ni hindi nga daw sa 'tin
Aayusin nalang natin 'gat hindi pa alanganin
Ang gaan na sa loob bigat pa ng pasanin
Nakarolyo pa bagain paikot sabay sa hangin
Sirkulo layo sa oblo malaya sa hangarin
Ang dating parang praning kakaumaling
Pagkita pagtingin sa malagkit na tanim
Goodstop nasa woods na mala-woodstack
Nakasabit lang sa hammock at padukat-dukat
Naka-acid isang blott at kurastobakot plant
Pero lahat ng 'yun joke lang kaya nga it's a prank

Ang baduy kung kayo lang 'wag na uyy
Sa mainit na kahoy usok nilalanguy
Wala ng panaghuy tila walang ka-uri
Bago magturo linisin muna ang daliri
Para 'di nga magsisi 'wag basta mawiwili
Gagagalingan mo nalang sa desisyong pinipili
'Wag mawala sa sarili ang tatandaan
Dadaanan mo lang 'yan 'wag mo tambayan, ano ba 'yan?

[Verse 3: Polo Pi]
Sakto sakit ng ulo wala naman masyadong ginawa tambay lang sa kanto
Kaya naman nandito napasama pa 'ko sa mga talentadong tao pero gago
'Wag ka lang masyado inaaning mo na 'ko
Tagay na yung fruit juice hawak ko sa baso
Malunggay nasa apip pakiabot nga dito
Sa panahon ngayon puro tangkay nalang yung piso
Asim walang ligo live ka pa sa Bigo
Dami mong sinulat walang labas na bago
Sa sobra kong payat hinahabol na 'ko ng aso
Ingat sa pag-abot baka ako d'yan ay mapaso
Kaso lalo pa akong ginaganahan
Talento ko ngayon ay akin pang pinagkitaan
Wais lang kase kapag puso ang pinairal
Dapat balanse ka sa tinatahak na daanan
Dami ng makitid, ano ba 'yan?

[Verse 4: Ghetto Gecko]
Kita mo lumalaganap enerhiya ko sa game yeah
Bagong katauhan, bagong roll, at bagong name yeah
Dati kong sariling 'di mahanap 'di ma-trace
Nahagilap ko sa ulap at in-e-enjoy yung taste hmm
Nasa lugar na 'di makikita sa Waze
Nag-be-blaze na 'di pangkaraniwang face
Naka-face mask on just in case yeah
Bawal magkakaso kase meron pa 'kong case yeah

THE FIRST TAKE is a YouTube Channel dedicated to shooting musicians and singers performing in a single take.

Episode 88 welcomes the world-renowned 5-member boys group TOMORROW X TOGETHER. 
Their EP released in October, вҖңminisode1 : Blue HourвҖқ has sold more than 470K copies in the first week and hit #25 on the US вҖңThe Billboard 200вҖқ for two consecutive weeks.

ONE TAKE ONLY, ONE LIFE ONLY.

snippet.title: Filipino comedian Jobert Austria finds new life in Canada
snippet.description:
Filipino comedian Jobert Austria has begun a new life in Canada where he says he can finally spend time with his wife following a long-distance relationship. But despite a new home, Austria says he always thinks about the Philippines, particularly its political climate. Quay Evano reports.

snippet.title: This Is The BIGGEST TRAGEDY In The NBA
snippet.description:
In yet another loss against the Houston Rockets, Bradley Beal couldnвҖҷt help but to let his emotions just take over, as he sat on the bench shaking his head and virtually crying.
So let me tell you why his story is the biggest tragedy in the NBA this season.
What up everybody my name is Stefan and this is Heat Check. LetвҖҷs get into it.
The same thing happened yesterday as well- during WashingtonвҖҷs latest game against the Pelicans. 
His 47 points 4 rebounds 6 assists and 4 steals werenвҖҷt enough as the Wizards fell to 3 and 11 for the season.
And you can see the genuine disappointment in his eyes and body language. 
After the game Beal was asked if heвҖҷs frustrated. And his answer was simple: Is the sky blue?
Bradley is doing everything in his power to will this Washington team, but itвҖҷs just not enough.
Look at this: He has now lost 10 straight games with 40 points or more. Alone at the top of this infamous list.
With 35 and a half points per game on 48% shooting he is the highest scorer in the NBA so far this season. But again, all that for nothing.
So I have to mention this: When he signed that big contract, I immediately came out with a video and said that he made a mistake. However I do love the loyalty, and the fact that Beal loves the city and is so close in the community but at the same time, this is not a team like Portland, or Milwaukee, or Boston. Contending rosters that just cannot get over the hump.
To get out of a situation like those and go to another team could possibly be portrayed as a bad move by the media.
But the Wizards are nowhere close to that. Even with the Westbrook trade I said that it doesnвҖҷt change anything. I had them in the 7-8 range in terms of standings and an early playoff exit.
But by no means did I expect this. And obviously Bradley wasnвҖҷt expecting it either.
The question now is: 1. With all of these videos of him clearly showing his displeasure and disappointment- is there possibly a chance for him to ask for a trade?
And if not- then number 2: How long until the Wizards pull the trigger themselves and finally go into a full rebuild mode, a couple of seasons later than they maybe should have?
If thereвҖҷs a perfect time- it definitely is right now. They are dead last in the entire league, and even with the new and updated draft lottery format, Washington will still get a high draft pick.
Combine that with a few more that they could get for the hottest commodity on the market right now in Bradley Beal, and there is a legit start for a rebuild.
As for Beal himself, he could make any of the playoff teams an instant title contender.
That could be the best possible solution for both sides. A struggling franchise looking for a fresh start, and a loyal but disappointed superstar, that just wants to win.
WeвҖҷll see how this one ends, but I have a feeling that a trade could be in the works pretty soon.
ThatвҖҷs it for now, subscribe and talk to you in the next one. Peace out.

snippet.title: ONE Championship: UNBREAKABLE II | Full Event
snippet.description:
ONE Championship is back with another night of nonstop martial arts fights on Friday, 29 January, as ONE: UNBREAKABLE II comes at you right here on YouTube at 8:30 p.m. SGT (some regions excluded).

In the main event, Italian powerhouse Mauro Cerilli squares off with Russian juggernaut Abdulbasir Vagabov in an explosive heavyweight mixed martial arts showdown!

They are joined on this electrifying card by Cameroonian behemoth Alain Ngalani, Senegalese wrestling sensation "Reug Reug" Oumar Kane, South Korean knockout artist Kwon Won Il, Cambodian-American star Sovannahry Em, and more!

Check out the full card for the previously recorded event below, and make sure you tune in!

Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Mauro Cerilli vs. Abdulbasir Vagabov

Flyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Daichi Takenaka vs. Ivanildo Delfino

Bantamweight Mixed Martial Arts
Chen Rui vs. Kwon Won Il

Light Heavyweight Kickboxing
Mihajlo Kecojevic vs. Beybulat Isaev

WomenвҖҷs Catchweight Mixed Martial Arts (62.5kg)
Sovannahry Em vs. Choi Jeong Yun

Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Alain Ngalani vs. Oumar Kane

#ONEChampionship #ONEUnbreakable2

snippet.title: Is Godzilla The Bad Guy In Godzilla vs. Kong?
snippet.description:
We've finally got our first real look at Godzilla vs. Kong and while there's certainly a lot to unpack in this trailer, perhaps the biggest question is: what's the deal with Godzilla and why is he being such a jerk?

The epic next chapter in the cinematic Monsterverse pits two of the greatest icons in motion picture history against one another - the fearsome Godzilla and the mighty Kong - with humanity caught in the balance. 

Godzilla Vs. Kong comes to cinemas and HBO Max in 2021 and stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd, Millie Bobby Brown and Rebecca Hall. Godzilla Vs. Kong is directed by Adam Wingard (Blair Witch, Death Note) and is the latest film is Warner Bros Monsterverse, following on from Gareth Edwards' Godzilla, Kong: Skull Island  and Godzilla: King of the Monsters.  
   
In a time when monsters walk the Earth, humanityвҖҷs fight for its future sets Godzilla and Kong on a collision course that will see the two most powerful forces of nature on the planet collide in a spectacular battle for the ages. As Monarch embarks on a perilous mission into uncharted terrain and unearths clues to the TitansвҖҷ origins, a human conspiracy threatens to wipe the creatures, both good and bad, from the face of the earth forever.

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
I got my driverвҖҷs license last week
Just like we always talked about
вҖҳCause you were so excited for me
To finally drive up to your house
But today I drove through the suburbs
Crying вҖҷcause you werenвҖҷt around

[Verse 2]
And youвҖҷre probably with that blonde girl
Who always made me doubt
SheвҖҷs so much older than me
SheвҖҷs everything IвҖҷm insecure about
Yeah, today I drove through the suburbs
вҖҳCause how could I ever love someone else?

[Chorus]
And I know we werenвҖҷt perfect but IвҖҷve never felt this way for no one
And I just canвҖҷt imagine how you could be so okay now that IвҖҷm gone
Guess you didnвҖҷt mean what you wrote in that song about me
вҖҳCause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

[Verse 3]
And all my friends are tired
Of hearing how much I miss you, but
I kinda feel sorry for them
вҖҳCause theyвҖҷll never know you the way that I do, yeah
Today I drove through the suburbs
And pictured I was driving home to you

[Chorus]
And I know we werenвҖҷt perfect but IвҖҷve never felt this way for no one, oh-oh
And I just canвҖҷt imagine how you could be so okay, now that IвҖҷm gone
I guess you didnвҖҷt mean what you wrote in that song about me
вҖҳCause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street

[Bridge]
Red lights, stop signs
I still see your face in the white cars, front yards
CanвҖҷt drive past the places we used to go to
вҖҳCause I still fuckinвҖҷ love you, babe (Ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)
Sidewalks we crossed
I still hear your voice in the traffic, weвҖҷre laughing
Over all the noise
God IвҖҷm so blue, know weвҖҷre through
But I still fuckinвҖҷ love you, babe (Ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh)

[Chorus]
I know we werenвҖҷt perfect but IвҖҷve never felt this way for no one
And I just canвҖҷt imagine how you could be so okay, now that IвҖҷm gone
вҖҳCause you didnвҖҷt mean what you wrote in that song about me
вҖҳCause you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
Yeah, you said forever, now I drive alone past your street
